reported_entities.name: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd. (Hon Hai Technology Group; internationally known as Foxconn Technology Group / Foxconn)
reported_entities.claim: 鴻海 resolves to Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., the Taiwanese electronics manufacturing services (EMS) conglomerate headquartered in New Taipei City, publicly traded on TWSE as 2317.TW. Its official English trading/brand name used globally is Foxconn (Foxconn Technology Group).

notes: Salva discovery run (objective=find_companies, market=Taiwan, industry=electronics manufacturing services, extra_keywords=['鴻海']) returned qualified_count=4, retrieval_health=ok, confidence=0.4006 for all entities. Top-ranked entity was the official Hon Hai Technology Group homepage (honhai.com/zh-tw and honhai.com.tw), plus a Yahoo Taiwan stock quote for ticker 2317.TW (鴻海) and a TVBS news article about the stock. All results consistently point to the same real-world company: Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., globally branded as Foxconn. No WebSearch queries were needed given the clear, consistent Salva output and well-established public knowledge of this company. OMLX embedding calls failed with connection-refused (expected local-service fallback warning per task instructions) but did not block retrieval.
